assertions.reason: Business user logged in via /business/login with email+password and was redirected to /business/dashboard; dashboard content rendered (not login UI).
/business/login shows simple email+password login with sign-in button and no OTP or verification-code UI.
Could not establish authenticated student session: registration attempts on /login returned 'Failed to create user account', and subsequent login attempts returned 'Invalid email or password'.
/login renders email+password sign-in plus visible register option, with no OTP/verification-code flow present.

blockers.description: Student account creation failed in UI ('Failed to create user account') for unique @babson.edu test accounts, preventing authenticated dashboard validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried registration with multiple unique emails and attempted login flow; issue persisted.
